ab: Ape, ga su sapa hi?
en: Ape, are you home?

ab: Ga ku hini, nleeluw remux truma.
en: Yes, come on in.

ab: Ape, ga su sapah hi?
en: Ape, are you home?

ab: Uka hini wa! Iwan ku ka yaku. Hmuwa? Rngae mu Ape da meyah.
ch: B:Ape不在家耶!我是Iwan，有什麼事嗎? 回來我會轉告Ape。
en: Ape is not at home. I am Iwan. What can I do for you? I will let him know when he comes back.

ab: Ima namu ka yamu?
en: Who are you?

ab: Bubu rudan, yami. Aking, ma Ape. Rwhani nami tikuh!
ch: B:奶奶，我們是Aking和Ape，幫我們開門!
en: Grandma, we are Aking and Ape, please open the door for us.

ab: Ima ha?
en: Who is it?

ab: Yaku wa! Batu, ni ku meyah skadi Utun.
en: I am Batu, I am here for Utun.

ab: Bubu rudan, ni ku meyah qmita isu wa.
en: Grandma, I am here to see you.

ab: Bsiyaq su ba ini eyah di, lnlungun sumu bale.
ch: A:你好久沒來了，我好想念你。
en: You haven’t been here for a long time. I missed you so much.

ab: Ape, ni ku meyah theyaq isu wa!
en: Ape, I am here to play with you.

ab: Remux truma, bsiyaq sumu traan da.
en: Come on in! I have been waiting for you for a long time.

ab: Pnhmaan mu ka bunga nii, puqi!
ch: A+:這是我種的地瓜，吃吃看!
en: This is the sweet potato I grow. Try it!

ab: Mssibus ba puuqn ka bunga nii.
en: The sweet potato is so sweet.

ab: Aguh hini! Pnhmaan mu ka hei qhuni nii, puqi!
ch: A:過來！這是我種的水果，請吃看看！
en: Come here! These are the fruits I grow. You should try it.

ab: Mssibus bale puqun wa!
en: The fruit tastes sweet.

ab: Tloung! Pnhmaan mu naq ka srqemu nii. puqi!
ch: A:請坐! 這是我種的有機玉米吃看看!
en: Take a seat! You should try some organic corn that I grow.

ab: Oo! Mssibus ba ka srqemu nii.
en: Wow! The corn tastes so sweet.

ab: Meekan su mudu?
en: Do you want some oranges?

ab: Ini ku ekan mudu, baka puqun mu da ringgo.
ch: B:我不能吃橘子，我吃蘋果就好。
en: I can’t eat oranges. I will have some apples instead.

ab: Mekan su hlama pingkan?
en: Would you want some cookies?

ab: Malu ma! Snkuxul ku mekan.
en: Sure, I like it very much.

ab: Kltane sumu ringgo puqun su.
en: Let me peel the fruit for you.

ab: Mhuwe su wa! Eguw ba beyuq na ka hei qhuni nii.
en: Thank you. This fruit is so juicy.

ab: Ngale ku qsiya mahun su.
en: I will bring you some water.

ab: Mhuwe su bale.
en: Thank you.

ab: Puqi! Eguw hnpure mu damac.
en: Enjoy yourself. I cooked a lot of dishes.

ab: Uu! Kncheya bale puqun.
ch: B:嗚! 真的很香也好吃。
en: Oh! It smells good and looks delicious.

ab: Puqi! Nii kana nana!
en: Enjoy yourself. There is a lot more.

ab: Uxe ku pqsiqa mekan da!
en: I’ll make myself at home then.

ab: Puqi, Nii kana nana!
en: Enjoy yourself. There are plenty here.

ab: Eguw bale pnuqan mu da! Mtengi ku bale di!
ch: B:我吃了好多，我真的吃飽了！
en: I ate a lot and couldn’t eat any more.
